data.description_suggestion: Initiates a new payment transaction with the provided payment details including amount, currency, buyer information, and order items. data.current_summary: Create a refund for a payment
data.description_suggestion: Initiates a refund for a previously created payment transaction. Requires the payment ID and refund details (amount and reason) in the request body. Requires API key and signature authentication. Returns a RefundResponse containing the refund ID and initial status (NEW). The refund is created in NEW state and can be tracked using the returned refund ID. Partial refunds are supported.

data.description_suggestion: Cancels a refund transaction that is in NEW status. Requires the refund ID as a path parameter. Requires API key and signature authentication. Only refunds with NEW status can be cancelled; attempting to cancel refunds in other states will result in an error. Returns a RefundResponse confirming the cancellation. This operation is useful for reversing refunds that were created in error before processing begins.
